compressed_context:
REPORT: IPCC-AR5  
CLAIM: 97% CONSENSUS THAT GHG-EMISSIONS→UNPRECEDENTED GLOBAL-WARMING  
SCENARIO: BUSINESS-AS-USUAL ⇒ TEMP↑>2°C  
CONSEQUENCES: POLAR-ICE→MELT ∧ SEA-LEVEL↑ ∧ PERMAFROST-THAW ∧ EXTREME-HEAT-WAVES↑ ∧ TROP-STORM-INTENSITY↑ ∧ EXTREME-PRECIPITATION↑  
IMPACTS: ECOSYSTEM-DISRUPTION ∧ FOOD-PRODUCTION↓ ∧ WATER-STRESS ∧ HEALTH-RISK↑  
DISTRIBUTION: POOREST-COUNTRIES ∧ SMALL-ISLAND-STATES WORST-HIT  
ESTIMATE: STERN-REVIEW[STERN:2007] FORECASTS TEMP-RISE5°C ⇒ GDP-LOSS5%–10%
